title: Griefless
description: (Mob Griefing Fix) Configurable mob griefing gamerules
body:
This mod adds a set of gamerules, replacing every vanilla instance of the `mobGriefing` gamerule.

All gamerules are prefixed with `griefless:`, and I tried to give them meaningful names.

It still works with the vanilla gamerule, the added gamerules only have effect if the vanilla gamerule is enabled.
